page.metaDescription: Explore PT. Property Group Imperium's portfolio of completed and ongoing projects in property development, construction, and real estate.
page.heroDescription: From residential towers to commercial complexes, explore our diverse portfolio of projects that showcase our commitment to quality and innovation.

detail.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how we can help bring your vision to life.

skyview-tahap-2.title: Skyview Tahap 2-5 Grand Plan
skyview-tahap-2.description: The master plan for Skyview Residence phases 2 through 5—continuing our integrated living concept with refined layouts, contemporary amenities, and elevated views for residents in Medan.

the-imperium.title: The Imperium
the-imperium.description: A modern villa residence development with multi-story homes, a gated entrance, and landscaped frontage. The site borders Gg. Setuju, Jl. Perkutut, and Gg. Raya Indah—combining contemporary minimalist architecture with wood and stone accents. We build with pride and integrity.
the-imperium.location: Medan, Indonesia (Gg. Setuju · Jl. Perkutut · Gg. Raya Indah)

kualanamu-permai.title: Kualanamu Permai
kualanamu-permai.description: A residential development in the Kualanamu area offering quality homes with thoughtful planning and modern community living, aligned with PGI’s standards for comfort and value.

the-nusa-indah.title: The Nusa Indah
the-nusa-indah.description: Villa residence development of 158 homes: modern single-story townhouses with pitched roofs, white and warm wood facades, and family-oriented streetscapes set among mature greenery.

sentosa-palace.title: Sentosa Palace
sentosa-palace.description: Villa residence community of 126 units—contemporary single-story homes with gabled roofs, bright facades, and landscaped frontages along wide internal roads.

simalingkar-residence.title: Simalingkar Residence
simalingkar-residence.description: Villa residence with bold modern rooflines, wood and glass detailing, and a color-coded master plan featuring green open space and water features—premium tropical living.

the-pancasila.title: The Pancasila
the-pancasila.description: Exclusive villa residence on 12 lots: two-story homes with distinctive mansard roofs, arched glazing, and private gardens—site plan includes dedicated entrance, garden, and parking areas.

skyview-residence-phase-1.title: Skyview Residence Phase I
skyview-residence-phase-1.description: A modern apartment complex with integrated living facilities, offering panoramic city views and contemporary lifestyle amenities for urban professionals and families.

mega-warehouse.title: Mega Warehouse
mega-warehouse.description: A state-of-the-art business warehouse facility designed for modern logistics and commercial operations, featuring efficient layouts and premium industrial specifications.

mega-setiabudi-village.title: Mega Setiabudi Village
mega-setiabudi-village.description: An integrated residential and commercial development combining villa-style living with convenient shophouse units, creating a vibrant community environment.

millenium-light.title: Millenium Light
millenium-light.description: A contemporary villa residence and shophouse development featuring modern architectural design with efficient layouts for both residential and commercial use.

mega-townhouse-2.title: Mega Townhouse II
mega-townhouse-2.description: The second phase of our successful townhouse development, featuring enhanced designs and modern amenities for comfortable family living and business operations.

graha-millenium.title: Graha Millenium
graha-millenium.description: A premium mixed-use development combining elegant villa residences with strategic shophouse units, designed for sophisticated urban living.

millenium-business-center.title: Millenium Business Center
millenium-business-center.description: A comprehensive business and residential complex featuring villa residences integrated with commercial shophouse units for optimal mixed-use functionality.

graha-anggrek.title: Graha Anggrek
graha-anggrek.description: An elegant residential and commercial development featuring villa-style homes with complementary shophouse units, creating a harmonious living and business environment.

mega-townhouse-1.title: Mega Townhouse I
mega-townhouse-1.description: Our flagship townhouse development combining residential villas with strategic shophouse units, setting the standard for integrated community living.

millenium-anggrek.title: Millenium Anggrek
millenium-anggrek.description: A well-planned residential and commercial development featuring comfortable villa residences with integrated shophouse facilities for modern urban living.

millenium-garden.title: Millenium Garden
millenium-garden.description: A beautiful villa residence development emphasizing green spaces and garden landscapes, offering tranquil living environments for families seeking quality homes.

the-green-rajawali.title: The Green Rajawali
the-green-rajawali.description: Our pioneering villa residence project that established PGI's reputation for quality development, featuring environmentally conscious design and premium construction standards.
